reason: Initial frozen exceptions for files already above the 1500-line source/test cap when the repo-wide size gate was added.

exceptions.reason: Artillery radius selection now shares the minimap's authoritative pointer lifecycle, including cancellation on interrupted or out-of-bounds release, so click-drag-release and two-click targeting stay consistent; keep ratcheting until minimap input handling is extracted.
The production stylesheet still owns shared shell, lobby, HUD, Lab, replay, and responsive presentation rules; keep ratcheting until those responsibilities have an evidence-backed split.

The harness still combines workload execution, reporting, active-player setup, and server startup; CPU profile mechanics are split into browser_profile.mjs, and this exception must keep ratcheting as the remaining responsibilities move out.

The recoverable full-sweep lifecycle now keeps run-state, exact Git/PR reconciliation, legacy adoption, and fail-closed reporting beside the existing classifier/generator transaction; keep ratcheting by extracting that cohesive lifecycle without splitting its recovery authority.
Checkpoint policy and simulation-architecture enforcement remain concentrated in this oversized checker; keep ratcheting until scanners and tests are split into modules.
The Attack DTO gained the optional Tank Trap cluster flag beside its mirrored queued flag; keep ratcheting until the remaining protocol DTO and integration-test groups are split.
Anti-tank range coverage moved into its focused module; keep ratcheting until the remaining combat tests are split.

Tank Trap cluster admission captures a fog-safe authoritative target set and applies per-unit weapon legality through the shared planner; keep ratcheting by extracting cohesive targeted-command admission and execution.

Cluster clearing adds a coordinator entry point that installs one serialized multi-target Attack order while preserving normal attack setup; keep ratcheting until coordinator order-entry policy is split.
Existing oversized movement test module before repo-wide source-size gate.
Game-state Phase 2 routes pathing through the DerivedState shell and exposes internal config preservation for reset; keep ratcheting until pathing diagnostics are split.
Player-activity classification moved out of the oversized server shell; keep ratcheting until more connection handling is split.
Render-worker diagnostics extracted their logging and classification into a focused module; keep ratcheting until the remaining net-report classification is extracted.

The minimap input contract suite now covers artillery click-drag-release, two-click, pointer cancellation, and out-of-bounds release behavior in its shared pointer fixture; keep ratcheting until artillery gesture contracts are split.
The existing targeted-command fixture now proves A-clicking a neutral Tank Trap emits the cluster flag; keep ratcheting until targeted-command contracts are split from the broad state/input fixture.
